name: Marincess Bubble Ring
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海晶乙女渦輪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マリンセス・バブルリング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a monster declares an attack: Negate the attack, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Marincess Crystal Heart" from your Extra Deck or GY. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Link-2 or higher "Marincess" monster you control; it can attack a number of times each Battle Phase this turn, up to its Link Rating, also your opponent takes no battle damage from attacks involving it this turn. You can only activate 1 "Marincess Bubble Ring" per turn.
eff: When a monster declares an attack: Negate the attack, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Marincess Crystal Heart" from your Extra Deck or GY. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Link-2 or higher "Marincess" monster you control; it can attack a number of times each Battle Phase this turn, up to its Link Rating, also your opponent takes no battle damage from attacks involving it this turn. You can only activate 1 "Marincess Bubble Ring" per turn.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

jp_sets.set: Duelist Pack: Duelists of the Abyss

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Link Rating
